The Fall of the Theorem Economy
articles.summary: Researchers have found that the traditional theorem economy model, which relies on mathematical proofs to validate software and hardware designs, is no longer sufficient. This shift towards a more practical approach has significant implications for developers who rely on these models to ensure their products are reliable and efficient. articles.title: The Physics of Memory (aka can Javascript ECS?)
articles.summary: The Physics of Memory is a question that has sparked debate among developers about whether it's possible to achieve high memory locality in interpreted or object-oriented languages like JavaScript. The Entity Component System (ECS) architecture, which mimics the column-based database model of ECS in other fields, offers a promising approach. By using a cache-friendly data structure and a sorting strategy that takes into account spatial locality, developers can potentially improve performance over objects + V8's garbage collection.

articles.title: A new Android malware from Google
articles.summary: A new Android malware from Google is spreading silently on devices worldwide, disguising itself as an innocuous verification process. The malware, known as "Android Developer Verifier" or ADV, runs surreptitiously in the background with full root privileges and can be activated remotely to block developers who haven't been approved centrally by Google. This threat vector has the potential to infect up to half of all Android handsets and tablets, posing a significant risk to users worldwide.

articles.title: Senior SWE-Bench: open-source benchmark that assesses agents as senior engineers
articles.summary: Senior SWE-Bench is an open-source benchmark that evaluates agents as senior engineers by treating them like junior engineers and introducing a validation agent to write behavioral tests. The benchmark assesses features, bugs, and code quality using realistic instructions and user reports from PRs with significant runtime investigation required. By combining runtime correctness tests with several quality metrics, Senior SWE-Bench scores tasteful solves that ship the right code without being told to do so. Integrating Google Books as a metadata source increases Open Library's ability to stage richer edition data, improving import success rates and user trust in the import experience.

This decision affects EU-US data transfers where the European Commission relies on the FTC as the enforcer of EU-US deals on personal data. This change may impact companies that outsource processing of personal data to US cloud providers.

articles.title: Progress Report: Linux 7.1 - Asahi Linux
articles.summary: The Linux 7.1 release includes a new progress report with M3 support, Apple bugs, and improved boot picker functionality. The Asahi Installer creates an APFS container with macOS on it to avoid needing users to run commands from Recovery every time they want to use the partition. This arrangement worked unchanged in previous versions of macOS but was removed after the release of macOS 27 Golden Gate developer beta. Inspecting diskutil revealed that all Asahi-related partitions were still present, and existing installations can now be fixed automatically by adding an installer mode.

articles.title: Building a passive Ethernet tap
articles.summary: A passive Ethernet tap is a simple device that sits inline between your computer and router, copying signals onto two extra monitor ports without injecting traffic back into the network. It has four RJ45 jacks and can be made with minimal components, including breakout boards, capacitors, and a mini breadboard. The tap effectively bypasses power requirements and software configuration, making it a low-cost solution for monitoring or testing Ethernet connections.

This enables developers to quickly experiment with data applications without leaving their IDE, while also providing a clean way to visualize results from AI assistants like Claude or GitHub Copilot. By removing the need to leave the tool and instead rendering the output directly in the chat via iframe, Panel Live Server streamlines the workflow for MCP-compatible AI assistants, making it easier to build interactive data applications.
